mechanism_narrative: Persistent increases in the unemployment rate signal a weakening labor market, reducing consumer income and spending expectations, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns as corporate earnings revision cycles deteriorate.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 4.6% is at cycle low but previous expansions ended with rising unemployment
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC of UNRATE vs 20-day forward returns remains above -0.03 or positive over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 5%, monetary policy is restrictive and compresses equity valuations through higher discount rates and reduced corporate investment, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Median 60-day forward return following FEDFUNDS > 5% is not significantly negative (one-sided t-test p > 0.10) or Sharpe ratio > 0.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in housing starts and elevated federal funds rates indicate severe housing market stress and restrictive monetary conditions, jointly amplifying recession risk and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST declined from 2268 peak (Jan 2006) to 1381 (Jul 2007) = 39% drop
failure_condition: Interaction term (HOUST decline * FEDFUNDS) has insignificant coefficient (p > 0.10) in a predictive regression for 20-day forward returns, or the signal's hit rate is below 40%.

mechanism_narrative: During a pronounced housing downturn with falling starts, industrial production weakens as construction and related manufacturing decline, and this supply contraction precedes negative equity returns as earnings forecasts are cut.
regime_hint: housing market downturn with spillover to industrial production
failure_condition: Rank IC of INDPRO during housing downturn periods is not negative (< -0.03) over a 3-year walk-forward window, or the conditional return distribution does not differ from unconditional distribution at 5% significance.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail and food services sales (RSAFS) reflect robust consumer demand, supporting corporate revenues and earnings, which drives positive S&P 500 returns as analysts revise estimates upward on strong spending data.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS has been trending up; latest value 377615
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC of RSAFS month-over-month growth vs 20-day forward returns remains below +0.03 or negative over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A negative monthly change in nonfarm payrolls is a sudden labor market shock that immediately reassesses growth expectations, triggering a sharp negative move in S&P 500 over the following week as investors price in recession risk.
evidence_refs: fact:Current PAYEMS=138037; previous month level not provided but the mechanism is triggered on negative prints
failure_condition: Average 5-day forward return after a negative PAYEMS print is not significantly negative (one-sided t-test p > 0.10) or is positive in more than 50% of occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous elevation in inflation (CPI) and interest rates signals stagflationary conditions: high inflation erodes real earnings and forces the Fed to remain tight, suppressing equity valuations over the next quarter.
evidence_refs: fact:CPI YoY was ~2.5% (from 208.0 vs 203.0 a year earlier) and FEDFUNDS=5.02%
failure_condition: The interaction signal (CPIAUCSL high and FEDFUNDS high) does not produce a negative average 60-day return that is statistically significant (p < 0.05) in a bootstrapped test against random triggers.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion with unemployment already at cycle lows (below 5%), further declines cannot be sustained and instead signal an overheated economy nearing recession, leading to negative forward returns as the cycle turns.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE=4.6% is below 5%, typical of late cycle
failure_condition: Walk-forward average 20-day return following UNRATE < 5% is not significantly negative (one-sided t-test p > 0.10) or the signal's accuracy for negative returns is below 50%.
